CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Judge: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

Judge: Anne-Christine Massullo; Clerk: S. Le; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-01-2022 Continued To Apr-25-23 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Self Represented Plaintiff Marilyn Dawson. The OSC is continued to April -25-2023. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; Clerk: JLee; Proceedings not reported.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-21-2022 Continued To Oct-25-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Marilyn Dawson, plaintiff appearing on her own behalf was late for the hearing. The Court finding good cause vacates its previous order dismissing the case without prejudice. The Order to Show is re-set to October 25, 2022 at 10:30am in Department 610. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; Clerk: GGonzales; Proceedings not reported.
